items.title: Attackers abuse shared ChatGPT and Claude chats to spread malware
items.summary: Attackers are exploiting the chat-sharing features in ChatGPT and Claude to spread malware through shared conversations. The chats mimic error messages or install guides and slip past security tools undetected because they're hosted on trusted domains.
